source_pr.title: ddl: implement reorganize for table partition when adding index
source_pr.body:
## What have you changed? (mandatory)

- Handle DDL reorganize for table partitions one by one
- Reorganize meta key changed from `handle` to `startHandle, endHandle, partitionID`

Please **NOTE** that:

This PR changes the DDL reorganize meta key, reviewer should be careful with the rolling update!

## What are the type of the changes (mandatory)?

- New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)

## How has this PR been tested (mandatory)?

unit test

## Add a few positive/negative examples (optional)

symptoms: rows := s.mustQuery(c, fmt.Sprintf("select c1 from test_add_index where c3 >= %d order by c1", start)) (ddl/db_test.go)
failure_signature: rows := s.mustQuery(c, fmt.Sprintf("select c1 from test_add_index where c3 >= %d order by c1", start)) (ddl/db_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: Patch implements partition add-index reorganization for DDL (feature/correctness); no targeted flaky-test stabilization change is evident.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: rows := s.mustQuery(c, fmt.Sprintf("select c1 from test_add_index where c3 >= %d order by c1", start)) (ddl/db_test.go)

files: ddl/index.go, ddl/reorg.go, model/ddl.go, ddl/ddl.go, ddl/ddl_db_test.go, ddl/ddl_api.go, sessionctx/variable/session.go, sessionctx/variable/sysvar.go, sessionctx/variable/tidb_vars.go, sessionctx/variable/varsutil_test.go, table/tables/tables.go, table/tables/tables_test.go, ddl/db_test.go, plan/rule_partition_processor.go, meta/meta_test.go, meta/meta.go, ddl/reorg_test.go
